data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits the number of choices to speed up decision-making.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes target sizes for easier accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Enlarged touch points for frequent actions.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Focus on placing frequently used features prominently to ensure recall.
data.technical_spec: Key functions positioned at the top and bottom of lists.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Designs memorable user experiences by ensuring a strong start and end.
data.technical_spec: Error-free onboarding and rewarding end interactions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Utilizes familiarity by adopting design patterns users expect.
data.technical_spec: Navigation similar to established social media norms.
